title: Default Implementation
text: Default Implementation Determines the default component implementation used at run time. You can override the Default definition by redirecting the component using the assignment file. In the Component Integration Editor, the default implementation is displayed in the Diagram tab. When defining signatures, if only one implementation is defined, it is displayed as the default. If more than one implementation is listed, click the appropriate check box to specify the default. When performing global updates, select the default implementation from the list. Applies To Signature Implementation Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
